metadata.description: Local marketplace for the agent-bridge Claude Code plugin — unified MCP server hosting both the outbound bridge_* tools and the inbound channel watcher for cross-machine agent-to-agent communication.

plugins.name: agent-bridge
plugins.description: Unified agent-bridge MCP server: 10 outbound tools (bridge_send_message / bridge_notify / bridge_learnings_add / bridge_learnings_search / bridge_receive_messages / bridge_run_command / bridge_status / bridge_list_machines / bridge_clear_inbox / bridge_inbox_stats) plus the inbound channel watcher that pushes incoming messages from paired machines into the running session as <channel source="agent-bridge"> events.
